---
title: "ROMS FAM 2km analysis"
author: "Jan Jansen"
output: html_document
---

###########################################
########## Evaluate ROMS outputs ##########
###########################################

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#### setup environment
library(terra)
fam.dir <- "C:/Users/jjansen/OneDrive - University of Tasmania/science/data_environmental/FAM_outputs"

```

########## Prepare data ##########

```{r, fig.dim=10}
npp.ra.list <- list()
track3D.ra.list <- list()
for(i in 1:10){
  npp.ra.list[[i]] <- rast(list.files(fam.dir, full.names=TRUE)[i])
  track3D.ra.list[[i]] <- rast(list.files(fam.dir, full.names=TRUE)[i+10])
}
```

```{r}
for(i in 1:10){
par(mfrow=c(1,2))
plot(npp.ra.list[[i]], range=c(0,1500), main=paste0("Region ",i," surface NPP"))
plot(track3D.ra.list[[i]], range=c(0,1500), main=paste0("Region ",i," sinking model output"))
}
```
